title: TruncProof: A Guardrail for LLM-based JSON Generation under Token-Length Constraints
authors: Yoshio Kato, Shuhei Tarashima
abstract: The LLM-based generation of machine-readable outputs such as JSON has attracted significant attention for integration with external systems. However, existing approaches cannot strictly enforce the maximum number of tokens to be generated, leading to infinite generation or truncated outputs that cause a system malfunction. To address this limitation, we propose TruncProof, a novel grammar-constrained generation method that enables LLMs to produce grammatically valid JSONs while adhering to a predefined token limit. By leveraging the properties of LL(1) parsers, TruncProof efficiently approximates the minimum number of tokens required to complete a grammatically valid output at each decoding step. Experiments on the Text-to-JSON instruction tasks demonstrate that TruncProof successfully generates syntactically correct outputs even under strict token constraints. Furthermore, we show that TruncProof can be effectively combined with advanced decoding strategies, resulting in outputs that are not only grammatically valid but also semantically accurate.
title_zh: TruncProof：令牌长度约束下基于LLM的JSON生成的防护机制
abstract_zh: 基于大语言模型（LLM）生成机器可读输出（如JSON）的方法因能与外部系统集成而备受关注。然而，现有方法无法严格强制限定生成的令牌数量，导致无限生成或因输出被截断而引发系统故障。为解决这一局限，我们提出TruncProof——一种新颖的语法约束生成方法，使LLM在严格遵循预设令牌限制的同时，生成语法有效的JSON。通过利用LL(1)解析器的特性，TruncProof在每一步解码时高效逼近完成语法有效输出所需的最少令牌数。在文本转JSON指令任务上的实验表明，即便在严格的令牌约束下，TruncProof仍能成功生成语法正确的输出。此外，我们证明TruncProof可与先进解码策略有效结合，生成不仅语法有效且语义准确的输出。

title: Protocol-Driven Development: Governing Generated Software Through Invariants and Evidence
authors: Jun He, Deying Yu
abstract: Automated program synthesis has reduced the cost of producing candidate implementations, but it introduces a harder governance problem: determining which generated artifacts are admissible in a software system. Natural-language specifications remain semantically ambiguous, and example-based tests sample only part of the behavioral space. Used alone, neither provides a sufficient control boundary for automated software construction. We introduce Protocol-Driven Development (PDD), a development model in which the primary software artifact is a machine-enforceable protocol rather than implementation code. We define a protocol as the triplet P = (S, B, O), where S specifies structural invariants, B specifies behavioral invariants, and O specifies operational invariants. Their conjunction defines the admissible implementation space of a software component. Under PDD, implementations are treated as replaceable realizations discovered through constrained search. An implementation is admitted if and only if it satisfies the governing protocol and produces a verifiable Evidence Chain of compliance. Admission is therefore grounded not in trust in the generator, but in protocol satisfaction and recorded evidence. By combining ideas from formal methods, property-based testing, policy-as-code, and software provenance, PDD defines a governance layer for automated software engineering. Its organizing principle is simple: code is transient; protocol is sovereign.
title_zh: 协议驱动开发：通过不变量和证据治理生成的软件
abstract_zh: 自动化程序合成降低了生成候选实现的开销，但同时也引入了一个更严峻的治理问题：如何确定哪些生成产物在软件系统中是可接受的。自然语言规范在语义上仍存在歧义，而基于示例的测试仅采样了行为空间的一部分。单独使用任何一种方法都无法为自动化软件构建提供足够的控制边界。我们提出了协议驱动开发（PDD），这是一种以机器可执行的协议而非实现代码作为主要软件制品的开发模型。我们将协议定义为三元组 P = (S, B, O)，其中 S 指定结构不变性，B 指定行为不变性，O 指定操作不变性。它们的合取定义了软件组件的可接受实现空间。在PDD下，实现被视为通过约束搜索发现的可替换的具体化。一个实现被接受当且仅当它满足所管辖的协议并生成可验证的合规性证据链。因此，接受的基础不在于对生成器的信任，而在于协议的满足和记录的证据。通过结合形式方法、基于属性的测试、策略即代码以及软件溯源的思想，PDD为自动化软件工程定义了一个治理层。其组织原则很简单：代码是暂时的，协议是至高无上的。

title: Dependence functions based on Chatterjee's rank correlation
authors: Carsten Limbach
abstract: We investigate a geometric and distributional reinterpretation of Chatterjee's $ξ$-coefficient, which measures functional dependence between a response variable $Y$ and a predictor vector $\mathbf{X}$. For this purpose, we analyze the Markov product $(Y,Y')$, where $Y'$ is a copy of $Y$ that is conditionally independent of $Y$ given $\mathbf{X}$. Based on this construction, we introduce and study two dependence functions, denoted by $φ_{(Y,\mathbf{X})}$ and $κ_{(Y,\mathbf{X})}$. The proposed framework provides a geometric interpretation of the Markov product and extends Chatterjee's correlation coefficient to a richer and more interpretable object for the analysis of directed stochastic dependence. In particular, rather than only measuring how well $Y$ can be represented as a function of $\mathbf{X}$, the proposed dependence functions additionally quantify how strongly the corresponding Markov product is concentrated near the diagonal.
title_zh: 基于Chatterjee秩相关的依赖函数
abstract_zh: 我们探讨了Chatterjee的ξ系数的几何与分布重解释，该系数衡量响应变量Y与预测变量向量X之间的函数依赖关系。为此，我们分析了马尔可夫乘积(Y,Y')，其中Y'是给定X条件下与Y条件独立的Y副本。基于这一构造，我们引入并研究了两个依赖函数，分别记为φ_{(Y,\mathbf{X})}和κ_{(Y,\mathbf{X})}。所提出的框架为马尔可夫乘积提供了几何解释，并将Chatterjee相关系数扩展为一个更丰富且更具可解释性的对象，用于分析定向随机依赖。具体而言，所提出的依赖函数不仅衡量Y如何能表示为X的函数，还额外量化了相应的马尔可夫乘积在对角线附近的集中程度。

title: Reward-Weighted On-Policy Distillation with an Open Property-Equivalence Verifier for NL-to-SVA Generation
authors: Qingyun Zou, Yingze Li, Tianen Liu, Bingsheng He, Weng-Fai Wong
abstract: LLM-based generation of SystemVerilog Assertions (SVA) is often reported as nearing saturation, with the strongest specialized model reaching ${\sim}76\%$ accuracy on NL2SVA-Human. We show that this aggregate hides a temporal gap: models that appear strong overall still collapse to a few implication templates on bounded-delay and liveness specifications. The core issue is that the dominant recipe, supervised fine-tuning on NL/SVA pairs, optimizes token-level mimicry rather than the \emph{property equivalence} that defines SVA correctness. We introduce \emph{Reward-Weighted On-Policy Distillation} (RWOPD), an on-policy distillation method that samples student rollouts, scores them with an open SymbiYosys+Z3 Property-Equivalence Checker (PEC), and applies a verifier-reward-weighted forward-KL gradient from a frozen 14B teacher on verifier-passable rollouts. This keeps the supervision dense at every response token while grounding both selection and loss weight in property-equivalent behavior. RWOPD distills CodeV-SVA-14B into a Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct student that sets a new state of the art on NL2SVA-Human and NL2SVA-Machine across pass@1, pass@5, and pass@10, surpassing both specialized prior SOTA models and 671B general-purpose baselines.
title_zh: 结合开放属性等价验证器的奖励加权同策略蒸馏用于自然语言到SVA生成
abstract_zh: 基于大语言模型（LLM）的SystemVerilog断言（SVA）生成常被报告已接近饱和，最强专用模型在NL2SVA-Human上达到了~76%的准确率。我们表明，这一汇总数据隐藏了一个时间差距：整体上看似强大的模型在有限延迟与活性规约上仍会退化为少数几种蕴含模板。核心问题在于，主流方法（在自然语言/SVA对上进行监督微调）优化的是词元级模仿，而非定义SVA正确性的“性质等价性”。我们引入了“奖励加权在线策略蒸馏”（RWOPD），这是一种在线策略蒸馏方法：它对学生的生成结果进行采样，使用开源的SymbiYosys+Z3性质等价性检查器（PEC）进行评分，并在验证器可通过的生成结果上应用来自冻结14B教师的验证器奖励加权前向KL梯度。这保持了每个响应词元上的密集监督，同时将选择和损失权重都基于性质等价行为。RWOPD将CodeV-SVA-14B蒸馏为Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct学生模型，该模型在NL2SVA-Human和NL2SVA-Machine上的pass@1、pass@5、pass@10指标上均达到了新的最优水平，超越了先前的专业SOTA模型和671B通用基线模型。

title: Liquid Tree Automata
authors: Ashish Mishra, Suresh Jagannathan
abstract: Component-based synthesis (CBS) generates loop-free programs from library components to satisfy logical queries. While expressive specifications and precise queries simplify the solution space, they make finding feasible execution paths significantly more difficult for traditional CBS procedures. As constraints become more exact, the search must navigate an increasingly sparse space of valid paths. We address this challenge by reasoning about \emph{logical similarities} between exploration paths. We consider library methods equipped with refinement-type specifications, which enrich base types with logical qualifiers to precisely constrain the value space. To efficiently explore this space, we introduce Liquid Tree Automata (LTA), a novel tree automata variant whose construction is driven by refinement typing rules. LTAs leverage subtyping constraints to identify and eagerly merge semantically similar states during search. This merging avoids redundant exploration of equivalent paths, significantly improving synthesis efficiency. We implement this approach in a tool called Hegel. Our evaluation demonstrates that Hegel synthesizes solutions to complex queries that are beyond the reach of existing state-of-the-art tools.
title_zh: 液态树自动机
abstract_zh: 基于组件的合成（CBS）从库组件生成无循环程序以满足逻辑查询。尽管表达性强的规范和精确的查询简化了解决方案空间，但它们使得传统CBS程序找到可行执行路径的难度显著增加。随着约束变得更加精确，搜索必须在越来越稀疏的有效路径空间中进行导航。我们通过推理探索路径之间的逻辑相似性来应对这一挑战。我们考虑配备有细化类型规范的库方法，这些规范通过逻辑限定符丰富基本类型，从而精确保值空间。为了高效探索这一空间，我们引入了液体树自动机（LTA），这是一种新颖的树自动机变体，其构建由细化类型规则驱动。LTA利用子类型约束在搜索过程中识别并主动合并语义相似的状态。这种合并避免了等效路径的冗余探索，显著提高了合成效率。我们将这种方法实现为一个名为Hegel的工具。我们的评估表明，Hegel能够为现有最先进工具无法解决的复杂查询合成解决方案。

title: Neurosymbolic Auditing of Natural-Language Software Requirements
authors: Bethel Hall, William Eiers
abstract: Natural-language software requirements are often ambiguous, inconsistent, and underspecified; in safety-critical domains, these defects propagate into formal models that verify the wrong specification and into implementations that ship unsafe behavior. We show that large language models, equipped with an SMT solver, can audit such requirements: translating them into formal logic, detecting ambiguity through stochastic variation in the generated formalization, and exposing inconsistency, vacuousness, and safety violations through solver queries on the resulting specification. We present VERIMED, a neurosymbolic pipeline that operationalizes this idea for medical-device software requirements, and report two findings. First, stochastic variation across independent formalizations is a signal of ambiguity: requirements that admit multiple plausible interpretations produce SMT-inequivalent formalizations, and bidirectional SMT equivalence checking turns this disagreement into a solver-checkable test. Second, the usefulness of symbolic feedback depends on its granularity: in counterexample-guided repair on a hemodialysis question-answering benchmark, concrete SMT counterexamples raise verified accuracy from 55.4% to 98.5%. Over an extensive experimental evaluation on open-source hemodialysis safety requirements, we show that the LLM-based approach in VERIMED successfully reduces ambiguity-sensitive requirements and enables rigorous auditing of software requirements through SMT-based queries.
title_zh: 自然语言软件需求的神经符号审计
abstract_zh: 自然语言软件需求通常存在歧义、不一致和规范不足的问题；在安全关键领域，这些缺陷会传播到形式化模型中，导致验证错误的规范，并传播到实现中，导致发布不安全的行为。我们展示了大语言模型结合SMT求解器能够审计此类需求：将其翻译成形式逻辑，通过生成形式化过程中的随机变化检测歧义，并通过求解器查询生成的规范来暴露不一致性、空洞性和安全性违规。我们提出VERIMED，一个神经符号学管道，将这一思想应用于医疗设备软件需求，并报告两个发现。首先，独立形式化之间的随机变化是歧义的信号：允许多种合理解释的需求会产生SMT不等价的形式化，而双向SMT等价性检查将这种分歧转化为可被求解器验证的测试。其次，符号反馈的有效性取决于其粒度：在针对血液透析问答基准的反例引导修复中，具体的SMT反例将验证准确率从55.4%提升至98.5%。通过对开源血液透析安全需求的广泛实验评估，我们展示了VERIMED中基于大语言模型的方法成功减少了歧义敏感的需求，并通过基于SMT的查询实现了对软件需求的严格审计。

title: Security Incentivization: An Empirical Study of how Micropayments Impact Code Security
authors: Stefan Rass, Martin Pinzger, Rainer W. Alexandrowicz, Georg Sengstbratl, Johann Glock, Alexander Lercher, Fabian Oraze, Christoph Wedenig
abstract: Security often receives insufficient developer attention because it does not directly generate visible value, leading to underinvestment in practice. We evaluate a countermeasure by team-level incentives tied to measurable security improvements over time. Our semi-automated mechanism aggregates static analysis findings from Bearer, Detekt, and mobsfscan, computes security issue density, and rewards teams based on the relative improvement ratio across sprints, enabling repeatable, scriptable reporting at scale. In a controlled course experiment with 84 students across 14 teams, we compared a security-incentivized condition, in which bonus points were linked to security scanner results, against a control condition with an otherwise identical grading scheme. The treatment group achieved significantly lower security issue density overall (beta regression: $β= -0.396, p = 0.0342$), indicating improved measurable security under incentivization. After controlling for platform, we observed a marked front-end/back-end disparity, with back-ends showing fewer issues and higher improvement ratios under incentives, highlighting heterogeneous effects across stack layers. Notably, these gains were not the byproduct of inflated code volume, as lines of code increased similarly across groups over time. The measurement pipeline and toolchain proved feasible for scripting and automation, supporting scalable adoption in practice. Our results suggest that aligning rewards with automated security metrics can measurably improve code security and merit follow-up in professional contexts and longer development lifecycles.
title_zh: 安全激励：微支付对代码安全性影响的实证研究
abstract_zh: 安全问题经常因无法直接产生可见价值而得不到开发者的足够关注，导致实践中投资不足。我们评估了一种通过团队级激励措施来应对这一问题的方案，该激励与随时间推移可衡量的安全改进挂钩。我们的半自动化机制聚合了来自 Bearer、Detekt 和 mobsfscan 的静态分析结果，计算安全问题密度，并根据跨迭代的相对改进比率对团队进行奖励，从而实现了可重复、可脚本化的大规模报告。在一项受控课程实验中，我们让 84 名学生组成 14 个团队，将安全激励组（额外分数与安全扫描结果挂钩）与对照组（评分方案完全相同但无激励）进行对比。实验组整体安全问题密度显著降低（贝塔回归：β = -0.396, p = 0.0342），表明在激励下可衡量的安全水平有所提升。在控制平台因素后，我们观察到明显的前端/后端差异：在后端，激励下问题更少且改进比率更高，这凸显了不同技术栈层间的异质性效应。值得注意的是，这些改进并非代码量膨胀的副产品，因为两组代码行数随时间增长幅度相似。该测量流程和工具链被证明适合脚本化和自动化，支持在实践中规模化采用。我们的结果表明，将奖励与自动化安全指标对齐可以显著改善代码安全性，值得在专业场景及更长开发周期中进一步探索。

title: AI Harness Engineering: A Runtime Substrate for Foundation-Model Software Agents
authors: Hailin Zhong, Shengxin Zhu
abstract: Foundation models have transformed automated code generation, yet autonomous software-engineering agents remain unreliable in realistic development settings. The dominant explanation locates this gap in model capability. We propose a different locus: software-engineering capability emerges from a model-harness-environment system, in which a runtime substrate -- the harness -- mediates how a foundation-model agent observes a project, acts on it, receives feedback, and establishes that a change is complete. We formalize this substrate as an AI Harness Engineering and identify eleven component responsibilities: task specification, context selection, tool access, project memory, task state, observability, failure attribution, verification, permissions, entropy auditing, and intervention recording. We operationalize the harness through a four-level ladder (H0-H3) that progressively exposes runtime support to the agent, and we propose a trace-based evaluation protocol that converts each agent run into an auditable episode package. Applied to a controlled validation task, the framework yields episode packages whose evidence structure varies systematically with harness level: lower levels produce only a final patch, higher levels produce reproduction logs, failure attributions, deterministic requirement checks, and structured verification reports. The framework reframes the central question of autonomous software engineering from whether a foundation model can produce a patch to whether the model-harness-environment system can produce a verifiably correct, attributed, and maintainable change. We outline a research program for the runtime systems that foundation-model software agents will require.
title_zh: AI 控制框架工程：为基础模型软件代理打造的运行时基座
abstract_zh: 基础模型已经改变了自动化代码生成的方式，然而在真实的开发环境中，自主软件工程智能体仍然不可靠。主流解释将这一差距归因于模型能力。我们提出不同的观点：软件工程能力源自于一个模型-框架-环境系统，其中运行时框架——即框架——介导了基础模型智能体如何观察项目、对其采取行动、接收反馈以及确认变更的完成。我们将这一框架形式化为“智能体框架工程”，并识别出十一个组件职责：任务规范、上下文选择、工具访问、项目记忆、任务状态、可观察性、失败归因、验证、权限、熵审计以及干预记录。我们通过四级阶梯（H0-H3）来操作化该框架，逐步向智能体暴露运行时支持，并提出一种基于追踪的评估协议，将每次智能体运行转换为可审计的情节包。应用于一个受控的验证任务时，该框架生成的情节包其证据结构随框架级别系统性地变化：较低级别仅产生最终补丁，较高级别则产生复现日志、失败归因、确定性需求检查以及结构化的验证报告。该框架将自主软件工程的核心问题从“基础模型能否生成补丁”重新定义为“模型-框架-环境系统能否生成可验证正确、可归因且可维护的变更”。我们概述了一个关于基础模型软件智能体所需的运行时系统的研究计划。

title: UIBenchKit: A unified toolkit for design-to-code model evaluation
authors: Chinh T. Le, Trevor Ong Yee Siang, Jingyu Xiao, Yuxuan Wan, Yintong Huo
abstract: Recent years have seen substantial progress in automated design-to-code generation, with many methods proposed for generating HTML and CSS from webpage screenshots. However, the absence of a standardized evaluation platform makes it difficult to compare these methods fairly, limiting both practical adoption and systematic research progress. To bridge this gap, we introduce UIBenchKit, an open-source, integrated toolkit designed to unify the evaluation of design-to-code tasks. UIBenchKit abstracts the complexities of environment setup, model inference, and code rendering, offering researchers a plug-and-play architecture to compare various methods under consistent settings. In addition, it offers an analytical interface for comparison across multiple metrics. Using UIBenchKit, we conduct a benchmarking study of existing tools and derive several findings that highlight directions for future improvement. By providing a streamlined environment for both experimentation and evaluation, UIBenchKit aims to accelerate future benchmarking and innovations in web engineering. The evaluation platform and toolkit are available at the project page https://www.uibenchkit.com/.
title_zh: UIBenchKit：一个用于设计到代码模型评估的统一工具包
abstract_zh: 近年来，从设计稿自动生成代码的技术取得了显著进展，目前已提出多种通过网页截图生成HTML和CSS的方法。然而，由于缺乏标准化的评估平台，这些方法难以进行公平比较，这不仅限制了实际应用，也阻碍了系统性研究的进展。为填补这一空白，我们推出了UIBenchKit，这是一个开源的集成工具包，旨在统一设计到代码任务的评估标准。UIBenchKit抽象了环境搭建、模型推理和代码渲染的复杂性，为研究人员提供即插即用的架构，使其能够在一致的设置下比较多种方法。此外，该工具还提供了用于多指标对比的分析接口。通过UIBenchKit，我们对现有工具进行了基准测试研究，并总结出多项发现，为未来改进指明方向。UIBenchKit通过提供简化的实验与评估环境，旨在加速网络工程领域的基准测试与创新。评估平台和工具包可在项目页面 https://www.uibenchkit.com/ 获取。

title: Automatic Detection of Reference Counting Bugs in Linux Kernel Drivers
authors: Joe Hattori, Naoki Kobayashi, Ken Sakayori
abstract: Reference counting bugs in Linux kernel drivers can lead to severe resource mismanagement and security vulnerabilities. We introduce DrvHorn, a novel automated tool to detect these bugs by reducing reference counting verification to an assertion checking problem leveraging the Linux driver interface. Through efficient modeling of the Linux kernel and aggressive program slicing, DrvHorn discovered 545 bugs, of which 424 were previously unknown, across all platform drivers in v6.6 Linux kernel, with a lower false positive rate of 29.9% compared to prior studies. To address the root causes of these newly discovered bugs, we submitted patches to the Linux kernel, and 45 of them were merged.
title_zh: Linux内核驱动中引用计数错误的自动检测
abstract_zh: Linux 内核驱动中的引用计数错误可能导致严重的资源管理问题及安全漏洞。我们提出 DrvHorn 这一新型自动化工具，通过将引用计数验证转化为基于 Linux 驱动接口的断言检查问题来检测此类缺陷。通过对 Linux 内核的高效建模与激进式程序切片，DrvHorn 在 v6.6 Linux 内核的所有平台驱动中发现了 545 个漏洞（其中 424 个为先前未知），且误报率（29.9%）低于以往研究。针对这些新发现漏洞的根因，我们向 Linux 内核提交了补丁，其中 45 个已被采纳。

title: When Should an AI Workflow Release? Always-Valid Inference for Black-Box Generate-Verify Systems
authors: Young Hyun Cho, Will Wei Sun
abstract: LLM-enabled AI workflows increasingly produce outputs through iterative generate-evaluate-revise loops. Each iteration can improve the candidate, but it also creates a release decision: when to stop and output the current result? This raises a statistical challenge because deployment-time evaluator scores are adaptively generated and repeatedly monitored, yet the likelihood models or exchangeability assumptions typically used for calibration are unavailable. We propose an always-valid release wrapper for existing generator-evaluator pipelines. The wrapper builds a hard-negative reference pool of high-scoring failures, calibrates deployment-time evaluator scores against this pool, and accumulates the resulting evidence with an e-process. This separates two roles: the reference pool turns black-box scores into conservative evidence, while the e-process provides validity under optional stopping. In theory, we show that a conservative reference pool yields finite-sample control of the probability of releasing on infeasible tasks, that is, tasks for which the given workflow is not capable of producing a reliable solution. We also characterize conditions under which the same conservative rule still achieves nontrivial release on feasible tasks. In an MBPP+ coding-agent case study, the wrapper reduces premature incorrect release relative to baseline stopping rules while still releasing on tasks for which the workflow repeatedly accumulates moderate supporting evidence.
title_zh: AI工作流何时发布？——黑盒生成-验证系统的始终有效推断
abstract_zh: 基于大语言模型（LLM）的AI工作流越来越多地通过迭代的生成-评估-修订循环来产生输出。每次迭代都可能改进候选结果，但同时也引出一个释放决策：何时停止并输出当前结果？这带来了统计上的挑战，因为部署时的评估分数是自适应生成并反复监控的，但通常用于校准的似然模型或可交换性假设却不可用。我们提出了一种针对现有生成器-评估器管道的始终有效的释放包装器。该包装器构建一个由高分失败案例组成的硬负例参考池，将部署时的评估分数相对于该池进行校准，并通过一个e-过程累积由此产生的证据。这分离了两个角色：参考池将黑盒分数转化为保守证据，而e-过程则在可选停止下提供了有效性保证。理论上，我们证明，一个保守的参考池能在有限样本下控制释放不可行任务（即给定工作流无法产生可靠解决方案的任务）的概率。我们还刻画了同一保守规则在可行任务上仍能实现非平凡释放的条件。在一个MBPP+编码代理案例研究中，该包装器相比基线停止规则减少了过早的错误释放，同时在那些工作流反复积累适度支持证据的任务上仍能执行释放。

title: Do Skill Descriptions Tell the Truth? Detecting Undisclosed Security Behaviors in Code-Backed LLM Skills
authors: Wenhui He, Yue Li, Bang Fu, Huan Xing, Xing Fan, ZeHua Zhang, Baoning Niu
abstract: Programmatic skills in LLM ecosystems consist of a natural-language description and executable implementation files. Users and LLMs rely on the description to understand the skill's scope. However, the implementation may perform security-relevant operations, such as credential access, network communication, or command execution, that the description does not state. We study this description--implementation inconsistency by asking whether the implementation stays within the security-relevant scope declared in the description. We manually analyze 920 real-world programmatic skills and construct an 11-category security property taxonomy. Based on this taxonomy, we build SKILLSCOPE, which constructs source-level security property graphs (SPGs) from implementations and performs LLM-assisted consistency checking. SPG nodes retain source-level code patterns rather than abstract taxonomy labels, preserving fine-grained evidence for checking. On 4,556 programmatic skills with double-blind human review, SKILLSCOPE achieves a precision of 84.8\% and a recall of 96.5\% for identifying inconsistency. Confirmed inconsistency affects 9.4\% of skills, while cases of coarser description, in which implementation details remain within the declared scope, account for 24.3\%. Ablation experiments confirm that both the SPG and the taxonomy contribute: removing the taxonomy reduces precision from 87.8\% to 72.3\%, while removing the SPG reduces recall from 94.7\% to 79.0\%.
title_zh: 技能描述是否说实话？检测基于代码的LLM技能中的未公开安全行为
abstract_zh: 在大语言模型生态系统中，程序化技能由自然语言描述和可执行实现文件组成。用户和LLM依赖描述来理解技能的范畴。然而，实现可能执行描述中未明确的安全相关操作，如凭据访问、网络通信或命令执行。我们通过考察实现是否超出描述声明的安全相关范畴，来研究这种描述与实现之间的不一致性。我们手动分析了920个真实世界的程序化技能，构建了一个包含11个类别的安全属性分类体系。基于此分类体系，我们开发了SKILLSCOPE工具，该工具从实现中构建源代码级安全属性图（SPG），并借助LLM进行一致性检查。SPG节点保留源代码级别的代码模式而非抽象的分类标签，从而为检查提供细粒度的证据。在通过双盲人工审查的4,556个程序化技能上，SKILLSCOPE识别不一致的精确率达到84.8%，召回率达到96.5%。确认存在不一致的技能占比9.4%，而描述较为粗略（即实现细节仍处于声明范畴内）的案例占比24.3%。消融实验证实，SPG和分类体系均有贡献：移除分类体系后精确率从87.8%降至72.3%，移除SPG后召回率从94.7%降至79.0%。

title: HLS-Seek: QoR-Aware Code Generation for High-Level Synthesis via Proxy Comparative Reward Reinforcement Learning
authors: Qingyun Zou, Feng Yu, Hongshi Tan, Yao Chen, Bingsheng He, WengFai Wong
abstract: High-Level Synthesis (HLS) compiles algorithmic C/C++ descriptions into hardware, with Quality of Results (QoR) -- latency and resource utilization -- critically governed by pragma configurations and code structure. Existing LLM-based HLS approaches train for functional correctness but ignore QoR entirely. We observe that reinforcement learning (RL) for HLS does not require absolute synthesis results -- only relative comparisons between candidates. Based on this insight, we propose \textbf{HLS-Seek}, a QoR-aware NL-to-HLS framework that replaces expensive synthesis-in-the-loop RL with a comparative proxy reward model achieving 99.53\% Pareto-dominance accuracy. To prevent reward hacking, we introduce \textit{uncertainty-aware Monte Carlo (MC) dropout switching} that selectively invokes real Vitis HLS synthesis for low-confidence candidates and online updates the proxy, creating a self-improving reward system. HLS-Seek achieves 81.5\% syntax correctness pass@1 and 81.4\% Func@5 on HLS-eval with only 7B parameters, surpassing GPT-5.1 and other frontier models while achieving 8.5$\times$ faster training than real-reward RL. On QoR evaluation, HLS-Seek achieves the lowest latency on 16/30 kernels and Pareto-dominates HLS-specific baselines on 9 kernels.
title_zh: HLS-Seek: 基于代理比较奖励强化学习的QoR感知高层次综合代码生成
abstract_zh: 高层次综合（HLS）将算法级C/C++描述编译为硬件，其结果质量（QoR，包括延迟和资源利用率）严格受编译指示配置和代码结构影响。现有基于大语言模型（LLM）的HLS方法仅针对功能正确性进行训练，完全忽略了QoR。我们观察到，用于HLS的强化学习（RL）并不需要绝对的综合结果——只需要候选方案之间的相对比较。基于这一洞察，我们提出了\textbf{HLS-Seek}，一个面向QoR的自然语言到HLS（NL-to-HLS）框架。该框架用比较代理奖励模型替代了昂贵且涉及综合在环的强化学习，实现了99.53%的帕累托支配准确率。为防止奖励破解，我们引入了\textit{不确定性感知的蒙特卡洛（MC）丢弃切换}，对低置信度候选方案选择性调用真实的Vitis HLS综合，并在线更新代理模型，从而形成自改进的奖励系统。HLS-Seek在仅7B参数的情况下，在HLS-eval上实现了81.5%的语法正确率（pass@1）和81.4%的功能正确率@5（Func@5），超越了GPT-5.1及其他前沿模型，同时训练速度比真实奖励强化学习快8.5倍。在QoR评估中，HLS-Seek在16/30个核上实现了最低延迟，并在9个核上帕累托支配了专用的HLS基线方法。

title: Where Does Reasoning Break? Step-Level Hallucination Detection via Hidden-State Transport Geometry
authors: Tyler Alvarez, Ali Baheri
abstract: Large language models hallucinate during multi-step reasoning, but most existing detectors operate at the trace level: they assign one confidence score to a full output, fail to localize the first error, and often require multiple sampled completions. We frame hallucination instead as a property of the hidden-state trajectory produced during a single forward pass. Correct reasoning moves through a stable manifold of locally coherent transitions; a first error appears as a localized excursion in transport cost away from this manifold. We operationalize this view with a label-conditioned teacher that builds a trace-specific contrastive PCA lens and scores each step with seven geometric transition features, and a deployable BiLSTM student distilled from the teacher that operates on raw hidden states without inference-time labels. We prove that contrastive PCA is the optimal projection for a transport-separation objective between first error and correct states, and that single-pass first error localization holds whenever the first error creates a positive transport margin over preceding correct transitions. On ProcessBench, PRM800K, HaluEval, and TruthfulQA, both models outperform entropy-based, probing-based, and attention-based baselines in-domain; the teacher transfers stably across language models and datasets, while the student collapses under shift, a gap our distillation theory predicts. These results recast step-level hallucination detection as a problem of trajectory dynamics and identify the central obstacle to deployment: preserving the contrastive transport margin under distribution shift.
title_zh: 推理在何处断裂？基于隐状态传输几何的逐步级幻觉检测
abstract_zh: 在大型语言模型进行多步推理时会产生幻觉，但现有的大多数检测器是在轨迹层面运作的：它们为完整输出分配一个置信度分数，无法定位第一个错误，并且通常需要多个采样完成。我们转而将幻觉定义为单次前向传播过程中产生的隐藏状态轨迹的一种属性。正确的推理会经过一个由局部一致转换构成的稳定流形；首个错误则表现为运输成本脱离该流形的局部偏差。我们通过一个标签条件教师模型将这一观点付诸实践，该模型构建了一个轨迹特定的对比PCA镜头，并用七个几何转换特征对每一步进行评分；以及一个从教师模型蒸馏而来的可部署BiLSTM学生模型，该模型在原始隐藏状态上运行，无需推理时的标签。我们证明了对比PCA是针对首个错误状态与正确状态之间运输分离目标的最优投影，并且当首个错误相对于之前的正确转换产生正运输裕度时，单次前向传播即可定位首个错误。在ProcessBench、PRM800K、HaluEval和TruthfulQA上，两种模型在域内都优于基于熵、基于探针和基于注意力的基线；教师模型在不同语言模型和数据集之间稳定迁移，而学生模型在分布偏移下性能崩溃——这一差距我们的蒸馏理论可以预测。这些结果将步骤级幻觉检测重新定义为轨迹动力学问题，并指出了部署中的核心障碍：在分布偏移下保持对比运输裕度。

title: ChipMATE: Multi-Agent Training via Reinforcement Learning for Enhanced RTL Generation
authors: Zhongkai Yu, Yichen Lin, Chenyang Zhou, Yuwei Zhang, Kun Zhou, Junxia Cui, Haotian Ye, Zhengding Hu, Zaifeng Pan, Ruiyi Wang, Yujie Zhao, Hejia Zhang, Jingbo Shang, Jishen Zhao, Yufei Ding
abstract: Existing API-based agentic systems for RTL code generation are fundamentally misaligned with industrial practice: they assume a golden testbench is available at generation time, rely on closed-source APIs incompatible with chip vendors' air-gapped security requirements, and cannot be trained on vendors' proprietary RTL codebases, leaving valuable internal data unused. Recent self-trained models address the deployment constraint but remain single-turn generators that overlook the critical role of verification in real industrial flows. To bridge these gaps, we present ChipMATE, the first self-trained multi-agent framework for RTL generation. Inspired by industrial practice where correctness emerges from cross-comparison between independently written RTL modules and reference models, ChipMATE pairs a Verilog agent with a Python reference-model agent that mutually verify each other's outputs without any golden oracle. We design a backtrack-based inference workflow to prevent error propagation across turns, and a two-stage training pipeline that first trains each agent individually to saturate its code-generation capability, then trains the team jointly to collaborate effectively. To support the training, we further build a hybrid data-generation framework that produces 64.4K high-quality reference model training samples. ChipMATE achieves 75.0\% and 80.1\% pass@1 on VerilogEval V2 with 4B and 9B base models, outperforming all existing self-trained models and even DeepSeek V4 with 1600B parameters. Our code and model weights are publicly available in https://github.com/zhongkaiyu/ChipMATE.
title_zh: ChipMATE：通过强化学习进行多智能体训练以增强RTL生成
abstract_zh: 现有的基于API的RTL代码生成智能体系统与工业实践根本不一致：它们假设在生成时存在一个黄金测试平台，依赖与芯片供应商的物理隔离安全要求不兼容的闭源API，并且无法在供应商的专有RTL代码库上进行训练，导致宝贵的内部数据被闲置。近期自训练模型解决了部署约束问题，但仍然是单轮生成器，忽略了验证在真实工业流程中的关键作用。为弥补这些差距，我们提出了ChipMATE，这是首个用于RTL生成的自训练多智能体框架。受工业实践（即正确性源于独立编写的RTL模块与参考模型之间的交叉比较）启发，ChipMATE将一个Verilog智能体与一个Python参考模型智能体配对，两者在没有任何黄金标准的情况下相互验证对方的输出。我们设计了一种基于回溯的推理流程，以防止跨轮错误传播；以及一个两阶段训练流程，首先单独训练每个智能体以饱和其代码生成能力，然后联合训练整个团队以有效协作。为支持训练，我们进一步构建了一个混合数据生成框架，产生了64.4K个高质量的参考模型训练样本。ChipMATE在VerilogEval V2上使用4B和9B基础模型分别实现了75.0%和80.1%的pass@1，超越了所有现有的自训练模型，甚至包括拥有1600B参数的DeepSeek V4。我们的代码和模型权重已在https://github.com/zhongkaiyu/ChipMATE公开。

title: The Readability Spectrum: Patterns, Issues, and Prompt Effects in LLM-Generated Code
authors: Hengzhi Ye, Fengyuan Ran, Weiwei Xu, Minghui Zhou
abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) are transforming software development, the functional quality of generated code has become a central focus, leaving readability, one of critical non-functional attributes, understudied. Given that LLM-generated code still needs human review before adoption, it is important to understand its readability especially compared with human-written code and the role of prompt design in shaping it. We therefore set out to conduct a systematic investigation into the code readability of LLM-generated code. To systematically quantify code readability, We establish a comprehensive readability model that synthesizes textual, structural, program, and visual features of code. Based on the model, we evaluate the readability of code generated by the mainstream LLMs under 5,869 scenarios extracted from large code base including World of Code (WoC) and LeetCode. We find that current LLMs produce code with overall readability comparable to human-written code, but displaying distinct readability issue patterns. We further examine how different prompt dimensions affect the readability of LLM-generated code, and find that function signatures, constraints and style descriptions emerge as the most influential factors, while the overall impact of prompt design remains limited. Our findings indicate that, on one hand, LLM-generated code is at least comparable to human-written code in readability, validating its potential for systematic integration into software workflows from a non-functional perspective; on the other hand, distinct readability issue patterns and limited effectiveness of prompt engineering reveal a latent technical debt, highlighting the need for future research to improve the readability of LLM-generated code and thus ensure long-term maintainability.
title_zh: 可读性谱系：LLM生成代码中的模式、问题与提示效应
abstract_zh: 随着大语言模型（LLMs）正在变革软件开发，生成代码的功能质量已成为核心关注点，而可读性这一关键非功能属性却未得到充分研究。鉴于LLM生成的代码在投入使用前仍需人工审查，理解其可读性（尤其是与人类编写代码的对比）以及提示设计在塑造可读性中的作用至关重要。因此，我们着手对LLM生成代码的可读性进行系统性研究。为了系统量化代码可读性，我们构建了一个全面的可读性模型，该模型综合了代码的文本、结构、程序与视觉特征。基于该模型，我们从包含World of Code（WoC）和LeetCode的大型代码库中提取了5,869个场景，评估了主流LLMs所生成代码的可读性。研究发现，当前LLMs生成的代码在整体可读性上与人类编写的代码相当，但呈现出不同的可读性问题模式。我们进一步考察了不同提示维度对LLM生成代码可读性的影响，发现函数签名、约束条件和风格描述是最具影响力的因素，而提示设计的总体影响仍然有限。我们的发现表明，一方面，LLM生成代码在可读性上至少与人类编写代码相当，这从非功能性视角验证了其系统化融入软件工作流的潜力；另一方面，独特的可读性问题模式以及提示工程有限的有效性揭示了潜在的技术债务，凸显出未来研究需着力提升LLM生成代码的可读性，从而保障长期可维护性。

title: Code-Centric Detection of Vulnerability-Fixing Commits: A Unified Benchmark and Empirical Study
authors: Nils Loose, Joseph Bienhüls, Kristoffer Hempel, Felix Mächtle, Thomas Eisenbarth
abstract: Automated detection of vulnerability-fixing commits (VFCs) is critical for timely security patch deployment, as advisory databases lag patch releases by a median of 25 days and many fixes never receive advisories. We present a comprehensive evaluation of code language model based VFC detection through a unified framework consolidating over 20 fragmented datasets spanning more than 180000 commits. Across over 180 experiments with fine-tuned models from 125 M to 14 B parameters, we find no evidence that models acquire transferable security-relevant code understanding from code changes alone. When commit messages are available, they dominate model attention, and when removed, an attribution analysis shows that enriching diffs with additional intra-procedural semantic context does not shift model attention toward the code changes. Group-stratified evaluation exposes approximately 17% performance drops compared to random splits, while temporal splits on aggregated datasets prove unreliable due to compositional shift in the underlying project distributions. At a false positive rate of 0.5% all fine-tuned code-only models miss over 93% of vulnerabilities. Larger and more diverse training data or generative approaches show preliminary improvements but do not resolve the underlying limitations. To support future research on code-centric VFC detection, we release our unified framework and evaluation suite.
title_zh: 以代码为中心的漏洞修复提交检测：统一基准与实证研究
abstract_zh: 自动化检测漏洞修复提交（VFC）对于及时部署安全补丁至关重要，因为咨询数据库平均滞后补丁发布25天，且许多修复从未收到咨询。我们提出了一项基于代码语言模型的VFC检测的综合评估，通过一个统一框架整合了超过20个分散的数据集，涵盖超过18万次提交。在超过180次实验中，使用从1.25亿到140亿参数的微调模型，我们没有发现模型仅从代码变更中获得了可迁移的安全相关代码理解的证据。当提交信息可用时，它们主导了模型注意力；当移除提交信息时，归因分析显示，用额外的过程内语义上下文丰富差异（diff）并不会将模型注意力转向代码变更。与随机分割相比，分组分层评估显示性能下降约17%，而聚合数据集上的时间分割由于底层项目分布的成分变化而证明不可靠。在0.5%的假阳性率下，所有仅基于代码的微调模型遗漏了超过93%的漏洞。更大更多样化的训练数据或生成式方法显示出初步改进，但未解决根本限制。为支持未来以代码为中心的VFC检测研究，我们发布了统一框架和评估工具包。

title: "Like Taking the Path of Least Resistance": Exploring the Impact of LLM Interaction on the Creative Process of Programming
authors: Zeinabsadat Saghi, Run Huang, Souti Chattopadhyay
abstract: Creativity is fundamentally human. As AI takes on more of the generative work that once required human imagination, despite documented limitations in creative ability, a critical question emerges: How does GenAI affect users' creativity? Through a within-subject study followed by retrospective interviews with (N=20) programmers, we investigated the impact of LLMs on participants' process of creative thinking in programming and the creativity of generated solutions. Across two conditions (LLM-assisted vs. unassisted), participants using LLMs had significantly shorter idea-generation periods (p=0.0004), leading to fewer creative moments (p=0.002). Qualitative analysis of participants' interactions and interviews revealed four different human-LLM collaboration modes supporting various problem-solving strategies. However, a comparative analysis of the generated solutions shows that while LLMs can help generate more correct and functional code, their solutions contain roughly the same number of ideas as participant-generated ones. Based on our findings, we discuss design implications and considerations for effectively using LLMs to support user creativity.
title_zh: "如同走最小阻力路径"：探索LLM交互对编程创意过程的影响
abstract_zh: 创造力本质上是人类特有的。随着人工智能承担了越来越多曾经需要人类想象力的生成性工作（尽管其在创造力方面存在已证实的局限性），一个关键问题随之浮现：生成式AI如何影响用户的创造力？通过一项被试内设计研究，并对（N=20名）程序员进行回溯性访谈，我们探究了大型语言模型（LLM）对参与者在编程过程中创造性思维的影响，以及所生成解决方案的创造力。在两种条件（LLM辅助 vs. 无辅助）下，使用LLM的参与者构思阶段显著缩短（p=0.0004），导致创造性时刻减少（p=0.002）。对参与者互动和访谈的定性分析揭示了四种不同的人机协作模式，支持了多种问题解决策略。然而，对生成解决方案的比较分析显示，尽管LLM有助于生成更正确、更功能完备的代码，但其解决方案中包含的想法数量与参与者自行生成的方案大致相当。基于我们的发现，我们探讨了有效利用LLM支持用户创造力的设计启示与考量因素。

title: TRIAGE: Evaluating Prospective Metacognitive Control in LLMs under Resource Constraints
authors: Zabir Al Nazi, Shubhashis Roy Dipta
abstract: Deploying language models as autonomous agents requires more than per-task accuracy: when an agent faces a queue of problems under a finite token budget, it must decide which to attempt, in what order, and how much compute to commit to each, all before any execution feedback is available. This is the prospective form of metacognitive control studied for decades in human cognition, yet whether language models possess it remains untested. We introduce TRIAGE, an evaluation framework in which a model receives a task pool and a token budget calibrated to its own baseline cost, and commits to a single ordered plan that jointly encodes selection, sequencing, and per-problem allocation. Plans are scored against an oracle with full knowledge of the model's solvability and cost on each problem, yielding a triage efficiency ratio on a common scale. We evaluate frontier and open-source models, with and without reasoning enabled, across competition mathematics, graduate-level science, code generation, and expert multidisciplinary knowledge, and find that current language models exhibit substantial gaps in prospective metacognitive control, revealing a previously unmeasured capability dimension with direct implications for resource-efficient agent deployment.
title_zh: TRIAGE: 在资源限制下评估大型语言模型的前瞻性元认知控制
abstract_zh: 将语言模型部署为自主智能体需要的不仅仅是单任务准确率：当智能体在有限token预算下面对一系列问题时，它必须在没有任何执行反馈的情况下决定尝试哪些问题、按什么顺序处理、以及为每个问题分配多少计算资源。这就是人类认知研究中已探索数十年的前瞻性元认知控制形式，然而语言模型是否具备这种能力仍未得到验证。我们提出TRIAGE评估框架：模型接收一个任务池和根据自身基线成本校准的token预算，并制定一个有序的单一计划，该计划同时包含选择、排序和每个问题的资源分配。计划得分通过与一个完全知晓模型在每个问题上的可解性和成本的"神谕"进行比较，得出统一量纲下的分诊效率比。我们评估了前沿和开源模型（无论是否启用推理能力），涵盖竞赛数学、研究生级科学、代码生成和专家级多学科知识领域，发现当前语言模型在前瞻性元认知控制方面存在显著差距，揭示了一个此前未被测量的能力维度，该维度对资源高效的智能体部署具有直接影响。

title: GeoBuildBench: A Benchmark for Interactive and Executable Geometry Construction from Natural Language
authors: Jinwoong Kim, Rui Yang, Huishuai Zhang
abstract: We introduce GeoBuildBench, a benchmark designed to evaluate whether large language models and multimodal agents can ground informal natural-language plane geometry problems into executable geometric constructions. Unlike existing geometry benchmarks that focus on answer correctness or static diagram interpretation, GeoBuildBench treats geometry diagram as an interactive construction task: given a textual problem, an agent must generate a domain-specific language (DSL) program to produce a diagram satisfying explicitly specified geometric objects and verifiable constraints. The benchmark features 489 Chinese textbook-style problems, curated through automated filtering and human validation to ensure text-complete, constructible problem specifications. We evaluate several state-of-the-art multimodal models in a bounded iterative setting and show that, despite reasonable success rates, models frequently exhibit structural hallucinations, missing objects, and failures to satisfy geometric constraints, with limited ability to exploit visual and constraint-based feedback for self-correction. These results highlight geometry construction as a rigorous testbed for grounded, executable reasoning beyond textual or visual plausibility. Our benchmark and code are publicly available.
title_zh: GeoBuildBench：面向自然语言的交互式可执行几何构造基准
abstract_zh: 我们推出了GeoBuildBench，这是一个用于评估大语言模型和多模态智能体能否将非正式的、基于自然语言的平面几何问题转化为可执行几何构造的基准测试。与现有关注答案正确性或静态图形解读的几何基准不同，GeoBuildBench将几何图形视为一项交互式构造任务：给定一个文本问题，智能体必须生成一个特定领域语言（DSL）程序，以产生满足明确指定几何对象和可验证约束的图形。该基准包含489道中国教科书风格的问题，通过自动筛选和人工验证进行整理，以确保问题描述完整且可构造。我们在有界迭代设置中评估了几个最先进的多模态模型，结果表明，尽管模型取得了尚可的成功率，但频繁出现结构性幻觉、对象遗漏以及无法满足几何约束的问题，并且利用视觉和基于约束的反馈进行自我修正的能力有限。这些结果凸显了几何构造作为超越文本或视觉合理性的、基于实体的可执行推理的严格测试平台。我们的基准和代码已公开。

title: Improving Code Translation with Syntax-Guided and Semantic-aware Preference Optimization
authors: Yuhan Wu, Huan Zhang, Wei Cheng, Chen Shen, Jingyue Yang, Wei Hu
abstract: LLMs have shown immense potential for code translation, yet they often struggle to ensure both syntactic correctness and semantic consistency. While preference-based learning offers a promising alignment strategy, it is hindered by unreliable semantic rewards derived from sparse test cases or restrictive reference translations. We argue that a robust semantic reward for code translation must be derived directly from the source code. In this paper, we propose CTO to improve code translation with syntax-guided and semantic-aware preference optimization. Through contrastive learning, we train a cross-lingual semantic model to directly assess functional equivalence between source and translated code. By formulating code translation as a multi-objective optimization problem, this robust semantic signal is seamlessly unified with compiler-based syntactic feedback within the direct preference optimization framework. Extensive experiments on C++, Java, and Python translations demonstrate that CTO significantly outperforms existing baselines and alternative preference optimization strategies.
title_zh: 通过语法引导和语义感知的偏好优化改进代码翻译
abstract_zh: 大语言模型在代码翻译方面展现出了巨大潜力，但往往难以同时确保句法正确性和语义一致性。尽管基于偏好的学习提供了一种有前景的对齐策略，但稀疏的测试用例或限制性的参考翻译所生成的不可靠语义奖励却阻碍了其效果。我们认为，稳健的代码翻译语义奖励必须直接从源代码中推导得出。本文提出CTO方法，通过语法引导与语义感知的偏好优化来改进代码翻译。借助对比学习，我们训练了一个跨语言语义模型，能够直接评估源代码与翻译代码之间的功能等价性。将代码翻译建模为多目标优化问题后，这一稳健的语义信号得以与基于编译器的语法反馈无缝结合，并集成到直接偏好优化框架中。在C++、Java和Python翻译上的大量实验表明，CTO显著优于现有基线方法和替代偏好优化策略。

title: AcquisitionSynthesis: Targeted Data Generation using Acquisition Functions
authors: Ishika Agarwal, Sofia Stoica, Emre Can Acikgoz, Pradeep Natarajan, Mahdi Namazifar, Jiaqi Ma, Dilek Hakkani-Tür
abstract: Data quality remains a critical bottleneck in developing capable, competitive models. Researchers have explored many ways to generate top quality samples. Some works rely on rejection sampling: generating lots of synthetic samples and filtering out low-quality samples. Other works rely on larger or closed-source models to extract model weaknesses, necessary skills, or a curriculum off of which to base data generation. These works have one common limitation: there is no quantitative approach to measure the impact of the generated samples on the downstream learner. Active learning literature provides exactly this, in the form of acquisition functions. Acquisition functions measure the informativeness and/or influence of data, providing interpretable, model-centric signals. Inspired by this, we propose AcquisitionSynthesis: using acquisition functions as reward models to train language models to generate higher-quality synthetic data. We conduct experiments on classic verifiable tasks of math, medical question-answering, and coding. Our experimental results indicate that (1) student models trained with AcquisitionSynthesis data achieve good performance on in-distribution tasks (2-7% gain) and is more robust to catastrophic forgetting, and (2) AcquisitionSynthesis models can generate data for other models and for low-to-high resource training paradigms. By leveraging acquisition rewards, we seek to demonstrate a principled path toward model-aware self-improvement that surpasses static datasets.
title_zh: 采集合成：利用采集函数进行目标数据生成
abstract_zh: 数据质量仍然是开发高性能、有竞争力模型的关键瓶颈。研究人员探索了许多生成高质量样本的方法。部分工作依赖拒绝采样：生成大量合成样本并过滤掉低质量样本。其他工作则依赖更大规模或闭源模型来提取模型弱点、必要技能，或基于此设计课程以指导数据生成。这些方法有一个共同局限：缺乏定量手段衡量生成样本对下游学习者的影响。主动学习文献恰好提供了这一手段——通过获取函数。获取函数衡量数据的信息量和/或影响力，提供可解释、以模型为中心的信号。受此启发，我们提出**获取合成（AcquisitionSynthesis）**：将获取函数作为奖励模型，训练语言模型生成更优质的合成数据。我们在数学、医学问答和编程等经典可验证任务上进行了实验。实验结果表明：（1）使用获取合成数据训练的学生模型在分布内任务上表现优异（性能提升2-7%），且对灾难性遗忘更具鲁棒性；（2）获取合成模型能够为其他模型以及从低资源到高资源的训练范式生成数据。通过利用获取奖励，我们旨在展示一条超越静态数据集、实现模型感知自我改进的原则性路径。

title: No Attack Required: Semantic Fuzzing for Specification Violations in Agent Skills
authors: Ying Li, Hongbo Wen, Yanju Chen, Hanzhi Liu, Yuan Tian, Yu Feng
abstract: LLM-powered agents can silently delete documents, leak credentials, or transfer funds on a routine user request, not because the agent was attacked, but because the skill it invoked broke its own declared safety rules. We call these specification violations: benign inputs cause a skill to breach the natural-language guardrails in its own specification, typically because the guardrail's semantics are undefined for autonomous execution, or because the implementation silently ignores the documented constraint. These violations are invisible to static analyzers, traditional fuzzers, and prompt-injection defenses alike, yet they undermine the very contract a user trusts when installing a skill. We present Sefz, a goal-directed semantic fuzzing framework that automatically discovers specification violations in agent skills. Sefz translates each guardrail into a reachability goal over an annotated execution trace, reducing violation checking to a deterministic graph query. An LLM-based mutator generates benign inputs whose traces progressively approach the violation patterns, guided by a multi-armed bandit that uses goal-proximity as its reward signal. On 402 real-world skills from the largest public agent-skill marketplace, Sefz finds specification violations in 120 (29.9%), including 26 previously unknown exploitable guardrail violations in deployed skills. Six recurring specification pitfalls explain the bulk of the failures, suggesting concrete principles for safer skill design.
title_zh: 无需攻击：针对智能体技能中规范违反的语义模糊测试
abstract_zh: 基于大语言模型的智能体可能会在常规用户请求下悄无声息地删除文档、泄露凭证或转移资金，这并非因为智能体受到攻击，而是因为它调用的技能违反了自身声明的安全规则。我们将此类情况称为规范违规：良性输入导致某项技能突破其自身规范中的自然语言防护栏，通常是因为防护栏的语义在自主执行时未定义，或实现过程静默忽略了文档化的约束条件。这类违规对静态分析器、传统模糊测试工具以及提示注入防御手段均不可见，却破坏了用户安装技能时所信赖的契约。我们提出Sefz——一种目标导向的语义模糊测试框架，可自动发现智能体技能中的规范违规。Sefz将每条防护栏转化为带注释执行轨迹上的可达性目标，将违规检测简化为确定性图查询。基于大语言模型的变异器生成良性输入，其轨迹逐步逼近违规模式，并由多臂老虎机算法以目标接近度作为奖励信号引导搜索。在来自最大公共智能体技能市场的402个真实技能中，Sefz在120个（29.9%）中发现了规范违规，其中包括已部署技能中26个此前未知的可利用防护栏违规。六个反复出现的规范设计缺陷解释了大部分失败原因，为更安全的技能设计提供了具体原则。

title: Retrieval is Cheap, Show Me the Code: Executable Multi-Hop Reasoning for Retrieval-Augmented Generation
authors: Jiashuo Sun, Jimeng Shi, Yixuan Xie, Saizhuo Wang, Jash Rajesh Parekh, Pengcheng Jiang, Zhiyi Shi, Jiajun Fan, Qinglong Zheng, Peiran Li, Shaowen Wang, Ge Liu, Jiawei Han
abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has become a standard approach for knowledge-intensive question answering, but existing systems remain brittle on multi-hop questions, where solving the task requires chaining multiple retrieval and reasoning steps. Key challenges are that current methods represent reasoning through free-form natural language, where intermediate states are implicit, retrieval queries can drift from intended entities, and errors are detected by the same model that produces them making self-reflection an unreliable, ungrounded signal. We observe that multi-hop question answering is a typical form of step-by-step computation, and that this structured process aligns closely with how code-specialized language models are trained to operate. Motivated by this, we introduce \pyrag, a framework that reformulates multi-hop RAG as program synthesis and execution. Instead of free-form reasoning trajectories, \pyrag represents the reasoning process as an executable Python program over retrieval and QA tools, exposing intermediate states as variables, producing deterministic feedback through execution, and yielding an inspectable trace of the entire reasoning process. This formulation further enables compiler-grounded self-repair and execution-driven adaptive retrieval without any additional training. Experiments on five QA benchmarks (PopQA, HotpotQA, 2WikiMultihopQA, MuSiQue, and Bamboogle) show that \pyrag consistently outperforms strong baselines under both training-free and RL-trained settings, with especially large gains on compositional multi-hop datasets. Our code, data and models are publicly available at https://github.com/GasolSun36/PyRAG.
title_zh: 检索是廉价的，给我看代码：面向检索增强生成的可执行多跳推理
abstract_zh: 检索增强生成（RAG）已成为知识密集型问答任务的标准方法，但现有系统在多跳问题（即需要串联多个检索与推理步骤才能完成的任务）上依然脆弱。当前方法的主要挑战在于：它们通过自由形式的自然语言表示推理过程，其中间状态是隐式的，检索查询可能偏离目标实体，且错误由生成该错误的同一模型检测，导致自我反思成为不可靠、缺乏依据的信号。我们注意到，多跳问答本质上是一种逐步计算形式，而这种结构化过程与代码专用语言模型的训练运作方式高度契合。基于此动机，我们提出了\pyrag框架，它将多跳RAG重构为程序合成与执行过程。\pyrag不再采用自由形式的推理轨迹，而是将推理过程表示为可执行的Python程序（基于检索与问答工具），将中间状态暴露为变量，通过执行提供确定性反馈，并生成整个推理过程的可检查追踪。这种形式还进一步实现了编译器驱动的自我修复与执行驱动的自适应检索，无需任何额外训练。在五个问答基准（PopQA、HotpotQA、2WikiMultihopQA、MuSiQue和Bamboogle）上的实验表明，无论是在无训练还是强化学习训练的设置下，\pyrag均持续优于强基线方法，尤其在组合性多跳数据集上提升显著。我们的代码、数据和模型已公开于 https://github.com/GasolSun36/PyRAG。

title: SieveFL: Hierarchical Runtime-Aware Pruning for Scalable LLM-Based Fault Localization
authors: Mahdi Farzandway, Fatemeh Ghassemi
abstract: Automated fault localization requires connecting an observed test failure to the responsible method across thousands of candidates--a task that purely statistical approaches handle with limited precision and that LLMs cannot yet handle at full project scale due to prohibitive token cost and signal dilution. We present SieveFL, a five-stage hierarchical framework that resolves this tension through aggressive pre-LLM filtering. SieveFL converts a failing test into a natural-language failure description, uses dense vector retrieval to narrow the search to a small set of suspicious files, and then eliminates any method not executed during the failing test via JaCoCo runtime traces. Only the surviving candidates are passed to the LLM, which screens each method individually and re-ranks the confirmed suspects in a single comparative pass. We evaluate SieveFL on 395 bugs from Defects4J v1.2.0 using a mid-sized, openly available MoE model deployed on a commodity workstation (32 GB RAM, 8 GB GPU) via Ollama--no frontier APIs or datacenter hardware required. Treating 12 incomplete runs as failures, SieveFL achieves Top-1 accuracy of 41.8% (165/395 bugs) and an MRR of 0.469, outperforming the strongest prior agent-based baseline (AgentFL) by 2.1 pp in Top-1. Runtime pruning removes 79% of candidate methods and reduces input token consumption by 49%, while simultaneously improving ranking quality: Top-1 is preserved exactly and Top-3 through Top-10 improve by up to 2.4 pp. These results demonstrate that, with the right filtering architecture, capable fault localization does not require proprietary frontier models.
title_zh: SieveFL：面向可扩展的基于LLM的故障定位的分层运行时感知剪枝方法
abstract_zh: 自动化故障定位需要将观测到的测试失败与数千个候选方法中的责任方法关联起来——这一任务纯统计方法处理的精度有限，而大型语言模型（LLM）由于高昂的token成本和信号稀释，尚无法在完整项目规模下处理。我们提出SieveFL，一个五阶段分层框架，通过激进的LLM前过滤来解决这一矛盾。SieveFL将失败的测试转化为自然语言失败描述，使用密集向量检索将搜索范围缩小到少量可疑文件，然后通过JaCoCo运行时追踪消除所有在失败测试期间未执行的方法。只有幸存的候选方法被传递给LLM，LLM逐一筛选每个方法，并在一次比较性重排中确认可疑方法。我们在Defects4J v1.2.0的395个bug上评估SieveFL，使用一个中等规模、公开可用的混合专家（MoE）模型，该模型通过Ollama部署在普通工作站（32 GB RAM, 8 GB GPU）上——无需前沿API或数据中心硬件。将12次不完整运行视为失败，SieveFL实现了41.8%（165/395个bug）的Top-1准确率和0.469的MRR，在Top-1上比先前最强的基于代理的基线（AgentFL）高出2.1个百分点。运行时剪枝消除了79%的候选方法，减少了49%的输入token消耗，同时提升了排序质量：Top-1完全保持，Top-3到Top-10提升了最多2.4个百分点。这些结果表明，通过正确的过滤架构，高效的故障定位并不需要专有的前沿模型。

title: Scalable Deductive Verification of Data-Level Parallel Programs
authors: Lars B. van den Haak, Anton Wijs, Marieke Huisman
abstract: This paper introduces several techniques that improve the scalability of the deductive verification of data-level programs working on arrays and matrices. First of all, we introduce a technique to rewrite expressions with (nested) quantifiers, so suitable triggers can be generated for these expressions. We have proven this rewrite technique correct in a theorem prover. Second, we make reasoning about potentially overlapping arrays easier, by providing specification constructs to indicate and verify that two arrays are not aliases, or that they are immutable, so they can be modelled as mathematical sequences. All our techniques are implemented in the VerCors program verifier. We illustrate how our techniques improve scalability through a large number of experiments. Using our techniques on a set of typical GPU kernels, we achieve a reduction of verification time by, on average, a factor of 9, with outliers being up to 150 times faster. Additionally, applying these techniques to earlier experiments and an earlier case study of a radio telescope pipeline permitted the verification of results which were previously unobtainable and significantly reduced the verification time.
title_zh: 数据级并行程序的可扩展演绎验证
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了几种提升面向数组与矩阵的数据级程序演绎验证可扩展性的技术。首先，我们提出了一种重写包含（嵌套）量词的表达式的方法，从而能为这些表达式生成合适的触发器，并通过定理证明器验证了该重写方法的正确性。其次，通过提供规约构造来标识并验证两个数组不存在别名关系或具有不可变性（从而可建模为数学序列），我们简化了对潜在重叠数组的推理。所有技术均在VerCors程序验证器中实现。通过大量实验，我们展示了这些技术如何提升可扩展性：在一组典型GPU内核上的测试中，验证时间平均缩短了9倍，个别案例甚至提速150倍。此外，将这些技术应用于早期实验及射电望远镜流水线案例研究后，成功验证了此前无法获得的结果，并显著缩短了验证时间。

title: How to Interpret Agent Behavior
authors: Jie Gao, Kaiser Sun, Jen-tse Huang, Katherine Van Koevering, Sijie Ji, Heyuan Huang, Weiyan Shi, Zhuoran Lu, Ziang Xiao, Daniel Khashabi, Mark Dredze
abstract: Autonomous agents such as Claude Code and Codex now operate for hours or even days. Understanding their runtime behavior has become critical for downstream tasks such as diagnosing inefficiencies, fixing bugs, and ensuring better oversight. A primary way to gain this understanding is analyzing the reasoning trajectories and execution traces these agents generate. Yet such data remains in unstructured natural-language form, making it difficult for humans to interpret at scale. We introduce ACT*ONOMY (a combination of Action and Taxonomy), a taxonomy for describing and analyzing agent behavior at runtime. ACT*ONOMY has two components: (1) the taxonomy itself, developed through Grounded Theory and structured as a three-level hierarchy of 10 actions, 46 subactions, and 120 leaf categories; and (2) an open repository that hosts the living taxonomy, provides an automated analysis pipeline that applies it to agent trajectories analysis, and defines an extension protocol for customization and growth. Our experiments show that ACTONOMY can compare behavioral profiles across agents and characterize a single agent's behavior across diverse trajectories, surfacing patterns indicative of failure modes. By providing a shared vocabulary, ACT*ONOMY helps researchers, agent designers, and end users interpret agent behavior more consistently, enabling better oversight and control.
title_zh: 如何解读代理行为
abstract_zh: 诸如Claude Code和Codex之类的自主智能体现在能持续运行数小时甚至数天。理解它们的运行时行为对于下游任务——如诊断低效、修复错误及确保更好的监督——已变得至关重要。获取这种理解的主要途径是分析这些智能体产生的推理轨迹和执行记录。然而，这些数据仍以非结构化的自然语言形式存在，使人类难以大规模解读。我们提出ACT*ONOMY（Action与Taxonomy的结合），一种用于描述和分析智能体运行时行为的分类法。ACT*ONOMY包含两个组成部分：(1) 分类法本身——通过扎根理论开发，构建为三级层次结构，包含10种动作、46种子动作和120个叶子类别；(2) 一个开放的存储库，承载这个动态分类法，提供将其应用于智能体轨迹分析的自动化分析管道，并定义用于定制和扩展的扩展协议。我们的实验表明，ACT*ONOMY能够跨智能体比较行为特征，并描述单个智能体在不同轨迹中的行为，揭示指示失败模式的规律。通过提供共享词汇，ACT*ONOMY帮助研究者、智能体设计者和最终用户更一致地解读智能体行为，从而实现更好的监督和控制。

title: QiMeng-CPU-v2: Automated Superscalar Processor Design by Learning Data Dependencies
authors: Xiangtao Guan, Shuyao Cheng, Rui Zhang, Pengwei Jin, Chongxiao Li, Tianyun Ma, Zidong Du, Xing Hu, Cheng Li, Yifan Hao, Guanglin Xu, Yuanbo Wen, Ling Li, Qi Guo
publish: IEEE Transactions on Computer-Aided Design of Integrated Circuits and Systems
abstract: Automated processor design, which significantly reduces manual efforts and accelerates design cycles, has been a key focus of recent research. Although prior work has achieved progress in designing simple processors, such as single-issue processors, their performance falls short of modern superscalar processors that execute multiple instructions per cycle. Current state-of-the-art methods fail to design superscalar processors due to their inability to handle inter-instruction dependencies effectively, which limits parallelism and results in inefficient execution. This work proposes a novel framework for automated superscalar processor design by introducing a hardware-friendly model: Stateful Binary Speculation Diagram (State-BSD). We observe that processor performance can be significantly improved by reusing the processor’s internal states to learn the data dependency. To address the challenge of limited hardware resources while maintaining high prediction accuracy, the proposed State-BSD includes three key components: 1) a lightweight state selector, trained with the simulated annealing method, which identifies the most reusable instructions and stores them in a small buffer, 2) an efficient state-replacer to dynamically replace unused states in the buffer under limited buffer size, and 3) a highly accurate state speculator which predicts interinstruction data dependencies using the buffered states. This work demonstrates the first automated design of superscalar processors with hardware-level optimizations. The processor designed using the proposed automated design approach achieves a 431.28× performance improvement with only 4.25× more area.
title_zh: 启梦-CPU-v2：通过学习数据依赖关系的自动化超标量处理器设计
abstract_zh: 自动化处理器设计能显著减少人工劳动并加速设计周期，已成为近年研究的重点。尽管此前工作在简单处理器（如单发射处理器）设计中取得了进展，但其性能仍无法与每周期执行多条指令的现代超标量处理器相提并论。现有最先进方法由于无法有效处理指令间依赖关系，导致并行性受限和执行效率低下，因而未能实现超标量处理器的自动设计。本文提出一种新型自动化超标量处理器设计框架，通过引入硬件友好模型——有状态二进制推测图（State-BSD）。我们观察到，通过复用处理器内部状态来学习数据依赖关系，可显著提升处理器性能。为在有限硬件资源下保持高预测精度，所提State-BSD包含三个关键组件：1）基于模拟退火训练的高效状态选择器，用于识别可复用性最强的指令并存入小型缓冲区；2）高效状态替换器，在缓冲区容量受限时动态替换未使用状态；3）高精度状态推测器，利用缓冲区中存储的状态预测指令间数据依赖。本研究首次实现了具备硬件级优化的超标量处理器自动设计。采用本自动设计方法所设计的处理器，在面积仅增加4.25倍的情况下，实现了431.28倍的性能提升。

title: Magnetic Field Uniformity as a Metric for RSFQ Circuit Bias Current Supply Optimization
authors: Minghui Niu, Minghui Zhang, Shucheng Yang, Xi Gao, Bicong Weng, Jie Ren
abstract: A key challenge in scaling up rapid single flux quantum (RSFQ) circuits is managing the magnetic interference caused by their bias current distributions. This paper establishes a simulation-driven framework for optimizing RSFQ circuit bias current supply configurations using magnetic field uniformity as the primary metric. Through Ansys HFSS 3D electromagnetic simulations and subsequent data processing, we demonstrated that magnetic field uniformity—rather than absolute intensity—exhibits a stronger correlation with circuit success probability. We developed a quantitative scoring metric to systematically compare and select bias current configurations. Applying this scoring metric to an 8-bit central processing unit (CPU) series, we found that the fully functional version exhibits 6.0% lower magnetic field non-uniformity in the arithmetic logic unit (ALU) block compared to the non-functional one. The proposed method provides a viable approach to optimizing the layout of large-scale RSFQ circuit, specifically to the design of the bias current supply network.
title_zh: 磁场均匀性作为RSFQ电路偏置电流源优化的指标
abstract_zh: 在扩展快速单通量量子（RSFQ）电路规模时，一个关键挑战是管理由其偏置电流分布引起的磁干扰。本文建立了一个基于仿真驱动的框架，以磁场均匀性作为主要指标，优化RSFQ电路的偏置电流供应配置。通过Ansys HFSS三维电磁仿真及后续数据处理，我们证明磁场均匀性——而非绝对强度——与电路成功概率的相关性更强。我们开发了一种定量评分指标，用于系统比较和选择偏置电流配置。将该评分指标应用于8位中央处理器（CPU）系列时，我们发现功能完整的版本在算术逻辑单元（ALU）模块中的磁场非均匀性比非功能版本低6.0%。所提出的方法为优化大规模RSFQ电路的布局，特别是偏置电流供应网络的设计，提供了一种可行途径。

title: Identifying Failing Flip-Flops in Scan-Based Designs Using Highly Compressed Test Results
authors: Grzegorz Mrugalski, Janusz Rajski, Maciej Trawka, Jerzy Tyszer
publish: IEEE Transactions on Very Large Scale Integration (VLSI) Systems
abstract: The semiconductor industry makes a major change by moving from FinFETs to lower technology nodes with angstrom-scale nanowire or nanosheet gate-all-around transistors. Keeping to Moore’s law, this pace of miniaturization coupled with heterogeneous integration of multiple dies into single packages has led to exponentially complex, tightly structured, and massively interconnected chiplets comprising trillions of transistors. These designs are inherently bound to witness new failure phenomena, including those causing elusive silent data errors. Typically, one of the first steps in an attempt to locate actual defects within a chiplet using scan chains and test compression is to identify failing flip-flops, i.e., memory elements (also known as scan cells) receiving erroneous signals. This article presents a novel scheme to address this challenge based on highly compressed production test outcomes. The scheme uses a simple, yet effective, test response compactor producing three companion signatures in space and time domains. The advantage of the scheme, further referred to as a triangular compaction, is its generic hardware, which, in conjunction with a highly parallel offline software, is capable of accurately identifying large failing flip-flop sets by narrowing the search space down to just a few equivalent solutions. No additional heuristics are needed to guide this process. The proposed scheme is well positioned to play a crucial role in rapid first silicon bring-up and debug or high-volume production fault diagnosis. This has been confirmed on production data from several industrial cores and is reported herein.
title_zh: 利用高度压缩测试结果识别扫描设计中的故障触发器
abstract_zh: 半导体行业正经历重大变革，从FinFET技术转向采用埃级纳米线或纳米片环绕栅极晶体管的更低技术节点。为遵循摩尔定律，这种小型化进程结合多裸片异构集成至单一封装，使得小芯片的晶体管数量达到万亿级别，结构紧密且互连复杂，呈指数级增长。此类设计必然面临新型故障现象，包括引发难以捉摸的静默数据错误的故障。通常，利用扫描链和测试压缩定位小芯片内实际缺陷的首要步骤之一，是识别接收错误信号的故障触发器（即存储元件，亦称扫描单元）。本文提出一种基于高度压缩生产测试结果的新颖方案以应对该挑战。该方案采用简单而有效的测试响应压缩器，在空间和时间域中生成三个伴随签名。该方案（下文称为三角压缩）的优势在于其通用硬件，结合高度并行的离线软件，能够将搜索空间缩小至仅少数等效解，从而精准识别大规模故障触发器集合。该过程无需额外启发式引导。所提方案在快速首片硅验证与调试，或高产量生产故障诊断中具有关键作用。多个工业核心的生产数据已证实其有效性，本文亦对此进行报告。

title: VeriTiny: Efficient Verilog Generation via Dual Learning and Dynamic Fine-Tuning
authors: Shuaifeng Huang, Lijuan Tang, Yadong Wang, Guang Yang
abstract: Automatic Verilog code generation based on large language models has emerged as a critical research direction in Electronic Design Automation (EDA). However, existing methods face two core challenges: (1) data scarcity, Verilog domain datasets are extremely limited, with current approaches either mining noisy open-source code from GitHub or synthesizing data via LLMs with uncontrollable quality and potential copyright issues; (2) model efficiency, high-performance models require billions of parameters, making them unsuitable for resource-constrained environments. To address these challenges, we focus on enabling effective model learning from limited labeled samples. We propose VeriTiny, a lightweight Verilog code generation model with 0.6B parameters, featuring two key components: (1) dual task learning with unidirectional pseudo-sample augmentation (PSA), where the reverse model generates pseudo-descriptions for real Verilog code to expand limited training data, while intentionally excluding the opposite augmentation direction to avoid noise from model-generated code; (2) Dynamic Fine-Tuning (DFT) that scales each token’s cross-entropy loss by its predicted probability, suppressing gradient variance and enabling more stable learning from scarce data. Furthermore, through continual pre-training on hardware domain-specific corpora to enhance Verilog syntax understanding, and a syntax-first selection mechanism to prioritize syntactically correct code, our approach significantly improves performance. Experimental results demonstrate that VeriTiny achieves 76.85% syntax correctness and 34.02% functional correctness on average, significantly outperforming baseline 0.6B models while matching mainstream 7B models in syntax correctness and approaching them in functional correctness, with only 10% of their parameters, substantially lower deployment cost, and competitive end-to-end local inference.
title_zh: VeriTiny: 通过双重学习与动态微调实现高效的Verilog生成
abstract_zh: 基于大语言模型的Verilog代码自动生成已成为电子设计自动化（EDA）领域的重要研究方向。然而，现有方法面临两大核心挑战：（1）数据稀缺——Verilog领域数据集极度有限，当前方法要么从GitHub中挖掘含有噪声的开源代码，要么通过大语言模型合成数据，但质量不可控且存在潜在版权问题；（2）模型效率——高性能模型需要数十亿参数，难以适用于资源受限环境。为解决这些问题，我们聚焦于如何从有限的标注样本中实现有效的模型学习。我们提出VeriTiny——一个轻量级的0.6B参数Verilog代码生成模型，包含两个关键组件：（1）基于单向伪样本增强的双任务学习（PSA）——逆向模型为真实Verilog代码生成伪描述以扩充有限的训练数据，同时刻意排除反向增强方向，从而避免模型生成代码引入噪声；（2）动态微调（DFT）——将每个token的交叉熵损失按其预测概率进行缩放，抑制梯度方差，从而在稀缺数据下实现更稳定的学习。此外，通过持续在硬件领域特定语料上进行预训练以增强Verilog语法理解，并采用语法优先的选择机制优先保留语法正确的代码，我们的方法显著提升了性能。实验结果表明，VeriTiny平均实现了76.85%的语法正确率和34.02%的功能正确率，显著优于基线0.6B模型，同时在语法正确率上与主流7B模型持平，在功能正确率上接近它们，而参数量仅为后者的10%，部署成本大幅降低，并且具备具有竞争力的端到端本地推理能力。

title: Improved Sparrow Search Algorithm Driven by Differential Observation Learning for Design of Wide Operating Range THz Mixers
authors: Jingrui Liang, Hailong Guo, Hongji Zhou, Yunjian Wu, Tianchi Zhou, Jiahao Yang, Ziqiang Yang, Yaxin Zhang
publish: IEEE Transactions on Terahertz Science and Technology
abstract: Terahertz harmonic mixers (THMs) are pivotal in terahertz systems, yet their design is hampered by high-dimensional coupling and extreme sensitivity as wavelengths approach device dimensions. Meta-heuristic algorithms offer a robust alternative for global optimization without the need for extensive pre-training. However, the standard Sparrow Search Algorithm (SSA) often suffers from premature convergence in complex design spaces. Existing SSA-DE hybrids frequently suffer from a functional mismatch between operators and evolutionary roles, or incur computational redundancy through static stacking. This paper proposes SSA-DOL, a search architecture integrating a Differential Observation Learning (DOL) mechanism and a Computing Resource Allocation (CRA) model. By constructing role-aware specialized operators, SSA-DOL aligns evolutionary semantics with THz physical constraints without increasing computational complexity. CEC2017 benchmark tests, including ablation studies, show that SSA-DOL outperforms state-of-the-art SSA variants, achieving competitive win rates of 68.97% and 86.21% against recent SOTA hybrids in terms of optimization accuracy. Using a fully automated MATLAB-HFSS-ADS framework with no manual intervention, a wideband mixer covering the 220-330 GHz frequency range a 110-GHz ultra-wideband mixer (220-330 GHz) was implemented. This design achieves a typical SSB conversion loss better than 12 dB with only 25% of the evaluation cost of traditional optimization methods. One-Factor-at-a-Time (OAT) sensitivity analysis confirms performance fluctuations remain below 0.1 dB under micrometer-level tolerances. Experimental measurements show an average deviation of only 1.45 dB from simulations, validating SSA-DOL as a robust and efficient solution for the automated synthesis of complex terahertz components.
title_zh: 差分观测学习驱动的改进麻雀搜索算法用于宽工作范围太赫兹混频器设计
abstract_zh: 太赫兹谐波混频器（THMs）在太赫兹系统中至关重要，但随着波长接近器件尺寸，其设计面临高维耦合和极端敏感性的挑战。元启发式算法为全局优化提供了无需大量预训练的稳健替代方案。然而，标准麻雀搜索算法（SSA）在复杂设计空间中常陷入早熟收敛。现有SSA-DE混合方法常存在算子与进化角色功能不匹配的问题，或因静态堆叠导致计算冗余。本文提出SSA-DOL，一种融合差分观测学习（DOL）机制与计算资源分配（CRA）模型的搜索架构。通过构建角色感知专用算子，SSA-DOL在不增加计算复杂度的情况下实现了进化语义与太赫兹物理约束的对齐。基于CEC2017基准测试（含消融实验）表明，SSA-DOL在优化精度上优于最新SSA变体，相较于近期最先进的混合方法分别获得68.97%和86.21%的胜率。采用全自动MATLAB-HFSS-ADS框架（无需人工干预），实现了覆盖220-330 GHz频段的110 GHz超宽带混频器（220-330 GHz）。该设计在仅消耗传统优化方法25%评估成本的情况下，实现了典型单边带（SSB）变频损耗优于12 dB的性能。单因素一次变化（OAT）敏感性分析证实，在微米级容差下性能波动仍低于0.1 dB。实验测量显示，与仿真结果的平均偏差仅为1.45 dB，验证了SSA-DOL作为复杂太赫兹器件自动化综合的稳健高效解决方案。
